reviews.review_description: A very nice puzzle game. Had a great companion 10/10 would cat again.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support. We're trying to create the best VR experience we can as best we can.

reviews.review_title: Great game that they keep updating
reviews.review_description: I have not played this game for a long time and decided to give it a try again. They had updated it and now have a whole first level done. This game is GREAT!

Interesting game concept and good idea, already relatively well implemented and fun to play. I don't know anything similar in VR, which is rare. The cat helps to solve puzzles by reaching areas where you cannot go. With this, she can bring things that you cannot retrieve yourself or trigger switches.

The game and puzzles are physics-based, and that works quite well already. However, it still needs a lot of work. I got stuck with my hand a few times and couldn't free it, so I had to respawn. These issues need to be resolved. Controlling the cat is also not easy and could be improved. Additionally, it took me a long time to figure out how to shoot a bow (Tip: Grab the arrow at the very back and put it in the bow).

Currently, it's more like a demo in terms of scope, but this demo is enjoyable. I hope new levels and updates will be added to make it a truly great puzzle game.

Is it worth the $4.99? Currently, no, there's not enough content, it's too short, and there are some bugs and relatively easy puzzles. Traps, laser beams, and moving platforms mentioned in the description were not present (probably still in development). However, if you want to try an interesting game concept, enjoy puzzle games, and want to support the developer, it's worth a try.

UPDATE: Last update from April 2023. Unfortunately no development. Downgraded to 2 stars.
